name: Storage + retention settings UI panel
description: Add a 'Storage' panel to the existing web/src/app/settings/page.tsx that shows disk usage (total, per-device, filesystem available) and lets the operator edit the retention window. Pulls from /v1/storage/usage and /v1/settings/retention.
acceptance_criteria: web/src/app/settings/page.tsx gains a Storage section: a filesystem-available progress bar, a per-device byte breakdown table, and a 'Retention' subsection
The retention subsection is a number input (days, min 0) with a Save button; 0 shows a help string 'Never delete automatically'
Save performs PUT /v1/settings/retention; success shows a toast, failure shows an inline error
Bytes are rendered with a humanize helper (KB/MB/GB/TB)
No new dependencies required; use existing components under web/src/components/ui/
pnpm --dir web lint and pnpm --dir web type-check pass
Manual check: load /settings, confirm usage loads and retention save round-trips
